item.title: Putin’s EU Puppet Is About To Have His Strings Cut
item.description:
https://x.com/RpsAgainstTrump/status/1748066577306493247?s=20
https://x.com/nexta_tv/status/1748266449519399106?s=20 The EU withheld funding to Hungary after Vic’s corrupt meddling with the courts. In retaliation, and to do his daddy Putin’s bidding, he blocked the massive military aide package to Ukraine. So now he’s about to have his voting privileges revoked. Note that even before this vote was taken, he backed down once he got wind of what was about to happen. But bastards like him can’t be shown any mercy or leniency, at all. Take them away and don’t give them back until Hungary pulls its finger out and elects someone else. Or leaves. Whatever they want, the decision is their’s, but no more Putin insiders fucking around.
item.dc:creator: Thelrishlnquistion

item.title: I don't really see any improvement in gaming unless we change
item.description: Downvote all you want. But, at least tell me where I'm wrong about this. From pre-orders to GTA5 being allowed to be milked forever, I honestly don't see any real or impactful pushback from the gaming community. If there's even anything we can do at all to stop this.
item.dc:creator: JustSomeDoodWhoWantsToUseThisWebsiteToInteractWithFellowPeople

item.title: The 390th vol. of "I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps - DOGS Edition #20
item.description:
STAY TUNED! I'll be releasing more MeeMays back into the wild Monday-Friday around 11:30 am, GMT-5, in my ""I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so that I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps" Or use Imgur's "Follow" Feature, which will alert you whenever one of my dumps goes Viral.
OMG
I'd vote for him.
I'm zzz
He's got business here, so you mind your own.
*dog people
TEN STARS
SMILE!
why are there commas in that sentence?
Dogs are the best, but you should never leave any animal unattended with a newborn.
STAY TUNED! I'll be releasing more MeeMays back into the wild Monday-Friday around 11:30 am, GMT-5, in my ""I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so that I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps" Or use Imgur's "Follow" Feature, which will alert you whenever one of my dumps goes Viral.
h*ck!
This is my newly commissioned Signature Image, by Dark Arts Studios. He's no longer on The Imgurs, I met him on ElbowDeepInAHorse's Discord Server. Here's where you can see his work: https://twitter.com/Anubis23342060 https://www.furaffinity.net/user/thed4rk1ord/ https://tailsofthegods.com/ https://dark-arts.itch.io/ FUN TIP / LIFE FACT / PRO HACK I upvote 90% - 99% of positive or neutral comments on my posts, as well as ≈50% of negative ones Shoutout to my fellow Dumpers: @DeafKitten @CodyBurkett @OhValleyOfPlenty @AbbiiStabbii @DigiT00l @MemeMuseumCurator @CeleryMan7 @DumpsterKoala @JebidiahBeetus @Kaeldra @KirbyVictorious @HermioneDanger00 @DumpReview @WhiskeyJelly @JasonPositivityPilot @danat101 @PotatoCheesMonk @VanessaNelson @NotMuchBiggerThanAWomprat @MindNumbingBraIncAndy @TheMellowMoron @TheWoodsAreVile @ThatOtherGirlYouKnow @IStealMemesAndStuff @DrWalters @DaymanAhAAAAah Lemme know If you are a Regular Dumper and would like to be added to the list! Archive Of Previous Dumps: Vols 1-300: https://imgur.com/a/vAfF9Wz Vols 301+ : https://imgur.com/a/oDakPaq Updated Whenever I Can Get Around To It #MemeDump #Puppers #Doggos #PuppersAndDoggos #AdolfHitlerSchoolForTheArts #TheWhoring20s #SaveTheBEEEEEES #BeeLM #SaveTheBees #JettfreyEpsfuelCandnt #CommeltSteelBeamicide #WhatIfNobodyShotJFK #AndHisHeadJustDidThat #EatingAppsTakingNaps #EatNamesAndTakeAss #MasturbatingIsNecrophilia #IfYoureDeadInside #DumpyMcGeeAndGuyNamedSteve #2Dumps1Site #AllTiddiesAreGoodTiddies #FreeTheNipple
item.dc:creator: PyroDragon

item.title: You'll never own a house thanks to Jeffs untreated greed.

item.title: HAPPY BIRTHDAY to this goat!
item.description: I'll be listening to Dolly 9 to 5 today, wondering Why'd You Come in Here Looking Like That, don't you know Jolene is around? But You Know I Love You, and not Just Because I'm A Woman. Me and Little Andy will be Two Doors Down, listening to Islands in the Stream, celebrating this American Icon! Dolly turns 78 today!
item.dc:creator: MadamPuddifoot

item.title: OK little humans, take me to the food.

item.title: Bottom shelf music to my ears dump. (Unmute)
item.description:
(Some videos including your comments that made the content much better) @usernamedoesnotwork
@StupidSexyCentaur @butthurtnevergetsbetter
@latearrival @ZombieZooZombieZoo @arkhamfashion
@kamosey
@Darcyhollywood39 @ilovethatyoucanmakestupidlongusernamesonthissite
@rawdog @DiscoFunkRefugee @kikisdeliveryservice
@depressedgarbage
@AVOToastt
@ssakm @SpikeTheGoat @Meikhaila
@HileyNoteson Yoooooooooooooooooooooo.
Now, enjoy hearing what life with Deaf Cat Magoo (short for Oogala Magoogala) sounds like. Here's 5 different days of me sneaking up on her Basket of Goo.
You can catch me live on twitch.tv/bottomshelfvodka streaming with my favorite Imgurians from the Bottom Shelf Community server.
Join for the games! We've been playing Lethal Company, Red Dead Redemption 2, Pay Day 3, GTA V, Jackbox, Among Us, 7 Days to Die, Sea of Thieves, Barotrauma, Minecraft, Ultimate Chicken Horse...if there's a specific game you like, I guarantee you'll find a shitposting meme loving Imgurian there to play it with you. Join for the memes! Imgurians share memes in the meme dumpster 24/7 Join for the Awe! Pay your pet taxes in the pet tex channel Join for the NSFW memes! Join to chat with hilarious people! Join to lurk in the corners! Join for the shockingly magnificent balance of wholesomeness and chaos. discord.gg/bottomshelfvodka Still unsure about the server? Check out our museum of stupidity. https://imgur.com/gallery/FYpqqAf
Deaf cat Magoo (short for Oogala Magoogala) tax. Privacy was never an option.
item.dc:creator: BottomShelfVodka

item.title: if i fits i sits house for sale in France
item.description:
"For sale in Saint Projet de Salers, village house with atypical architecture with a view of the Monts du Cantal. The entrance is to the large living room with a traditional cantou. The rotunda-shaped living room, a bright alcove, opens onto a terrace with an unobstructed view of the mountains."
"On the first floor: two bedrooms, one with a view of the mountains, a bathroom and separate toilets. In the semi-basement: a large room that can be converted into a bedroom, a shower room and a separate toilet. Possibility to create an independent studio. This house with its unique character needs some refreshments to restore it to its charm. Gas heating. Double glazed wooden windows."
via https://www.instagram.com/cheapoldhouses/
item.dc:creator: poponthebeezer

item.title: Big pharma must be crushed
item.description: #bigpharma #medicineforprofit #lobbyingequalsbribery "a Missouri man died after being struck twice by a venomous snake because of his refusal to pay the high price of hospital care." Edit (source added): https://health.howstuffworks.com/medicine/medication/why-snakebite-antivenom-expensive.htm (originally posted by @mynamejosejimenez on 2023-01-20 14:53:58)

item.title: It's the unhinged XL Friday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
it really is uncanny
I’ve been attacked
probably Greg
looks serious
I mean, yeah
yes this is sportsball related
terrified of the ocean beyond 10 ft deep.. no thanks
it’s true
sounds scary, having a wife
he brought it upon himself
my hero
hmm.. gonna pass
mmm hmm
someone’s gotta do it
only in Africa apparently.. phew
do it
that's my time.. have a great weekend gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7
